action.reasoning: Observation: Starting with empty workspace on fMoW WILDS task (62-class satellite classification, worst-region acc metric). Analysis: Must establish baseline quickly per instructions - use CLIP ViT-B/16 vision encoder + linear head (fits <1B param limit, leverages pretrained visual features for satellite imagery). Train 3 epochs initially with DataParallel on 4 GPUs to measure time/validate pipeline. Decision: Write all core files (model, train, predict, dataset utils), run short training, then submit_eval for first score and timing measurement.
